description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script to display python and git versions and install the python-xlsxwriter package via apt. Add a job named build_package_categories (default stage) that executes ls -l, clones the packages.wiki repository using the ARM_WIKI_KEY secret, changes into the repository, runs python ../package_categories.py, checks git status, configures git user.email and user.name, sets push.default to simple, and if there are changes commits them with the message 'Pipeline updating summary pages' and pushes them. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules.
